top3.sql:
SELECT (strftime('%Y', '1991-10-21') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', '1991-10-21') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.UA = 8.4 AND l.Date = '1991-10-21';

SELECT (julianday('1991-10-21') - julianday(p.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS Age
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.UA = 8.4 AND l.Date = '1991-10-21';

SELECT (strftime('%Y', '1991-10-21') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', '1991-10-21') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.UA = 8.4 AND l.Date = '1991-10-21';

SELECT (julianday('1991-10-21') - julianday(p.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS Age
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.UA = 8.4 AND l.Date = '1991-10-21';

SELECT CAST((julianday('1991-10-21') - julianday(p.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.UA = 8.4 AND l.Date = '1991-10-21';

SELECT (strftime('%Y', '1991-10-21') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', '1991-10-21') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.UA = 8.4 AND l.Date = '1991-10-21';
